items.name: Chronos
items.description: Kodezi Chronos is a debugging-first language model that achieves state-of-the-art results on SWE-bench Lite (80.33%) and 67% real-world fix accuracy, over six times better than GPT-4. Built with Adaptive Graph-Guided Retrieval and Persistent Debug Memory. Model available Q1 2026 via Kodezi OS.

items.description: The Qualcomm® AI Hub apps are a collection of state-of-the-art machine learning models optimized for performance (latency, memory etc.) and ready to deploy on Qualcomm® devices.

items.name: yishape-math
items.description: YiShape-Math is a Java math library that provides NumPy-like functionalities including vector & matrix operations, data visualization, statistics, optimization, time series, signal processing, audio analysis, image processing and machine learning models.
